title: lithocardium tenuifolium
intro: Lithocardium tenuifolium, also known as the Lithospermum tenuifolium, is a flowering plant species in the family Boraginaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and act as a diuretic due to its high content of alkaloids and saponins. Lithocardium tenuifolium has been used to treat conditions such as hypertension, heart conditions, and edema, providing various health benefits including reduced blood pressure, improved circulation, and reduced risk of cardiovascular disease. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
